title: Scaffolding command, doc resolver, and gate presets
description:
The user-facing commands and gate presets that stand up a bracket: a plan-document resolver, the scaffolding command, and the two gate presets.

## Success Criteria

- [ ] A plan document can live inline or at a configured external path and is validated through the pure engine.
- [ ] A single command brackets a container, creating and wiring the planning node and applying the plan-review gate.
- [ ] `plan-review` and `coverage-preview` gate presets exist and attach to the correct nodes.
